nasb.text: The peoples will be burned to lime, Like cut thorns which are burned in the fire.

esv.text: And the peoples will be as if burned to lime, like thorns cut down, that are burned in the fire.”

cnv.text: 眾民必像燃燒的石灰， 又像被割下的荊棘，在火中焚燒。

ccb.text: 列邦必被烧成灰烬， 好像割下的荆棘被火焚烧。”

csbs.text: 众民必被烧成灰烬， 好像砍下的荆棘在火中烧掉。
